summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X67 Digital Media Groupe marketplace. Backend APIs mostly functional with authentication issues. Frontend UI working with some form control problems.

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication middleware not properly protecting routes - returns 200 instead of 401 when unauthenticated
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - protected endpoints accessible without authentication

service_issues.symptoms: Returns 521 'Payment service unavailable' instead of processing payment

ui_bugs.issue: City and subcategory filter dropdowns not working - selectors not found
Category and city dropdowns not working properly in multi-step form

integration_issues.issue: Protected routes accessible without authentication - no redirect to auth page

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with banner carousel
Categories grid displays with hover effects
Price and sort filters work on category page
User login works with valid credentials
Admin panel accessible after admin login
Create ad page accessible after login
All basic API endpoints work (categories, cities, car brands)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication middleware to properly protect routes. Fix category page filter dropdowns and create ad form dropdowns. Configure Viva Wallet payment service properly.
success_percentage: Backend: 81% (21/26 tests passed), Frontend: 70% (major functionality works but form controls need fixes)
